name: cos-scheduling-assistant
description: Chief of Staff Scheduling Assistant PoC — natural-language calendar control

scripts.install:all: cd 'Scheduling app backend' && npm install && cd '../Scheduling app frontend' && npm install
scripts.db:setup: cd 'Scheduling app backend' && npm run db:setup
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.test: cd 'Scheduling app backend' && npm test && cd '../Scheduling app frontend' && npm test
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "cd 'Scheduling app backend' && npm run dev" "cd 'Scheduling app frontend' && npm run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: cd 'Scheduling app backend' && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd 'Scheduling app frontend' && npm run dev
